sections.heading: Understand Percentages Easily with Our Percentage Calculator
sections.content: Our Percentage Calculator helps you solve all types of percentage problems instantly. Whether you need to find a percent, calculate increase or decrease, or convert values, this tool makes percentage calculations simple and accurate.

sections.heading: How to Use the Percentage Calculator
sections.content: Using the calculator is quick and straightforward. Just enter your values and get instant results without any manual math.

subSections.heading: Steps to Use:
subSections.content: Enter the initial value (original number). Enter the percentage you want to calculate. Click Calculate to get the result. For reverse calculations (e.g., 'X is what percent of Y'), choose the corresponding mode. For percentage change, enter Old Value → New Value → Calculate.

sections.heading: Calculator Modes We Support
sections.content: The tool offers multiple modes to help you solve different types of percentage problems easily.

subSections.heading: Find Percentage
subSections.content: Calculate what percent a number represents.

subSections.heading: Percentage of a Number
subSections.content: Find a specific percent of any number.

subSections.heading: Percentage Increase / Decrease
subSections.content: Calculate growth or reduction between two values.

subSections.heading: Reverse Percentage
subSections.content: Find what percent one number is of another.

subSections.heading: Percentage Conversion
subSections.content: Convert percentages to decimals or fractions and vice versa.

subSections.heading: Average Percentage
subSections.content: Compute the average of multiple percentage values.

subSections.heading: Fast & Accurate Results
subSections.content: Get instant answers for all percentage calculations without using formulas.

subSections.heading: Beginner-Friendly Design
subSections.content: Easy to use for students, professionals, teachers, and everyday tasks.

subSections.heading: Mobile-Friendly & Free
subSections.content: Works smoothly on all devices with no signup needed.

subSections.heading: Reliable & Standard Formulas
subSections.content: Built on standard mathematical rules for trustworthy results.

subSections.heading: Academics & Students
subSections.content: Calculate marks percentage, average percentage, and exam results.

subSections.heading: Business & Finance
subSections.content: Analyze profit/loss percentage, interest, and financial growth.

subSections.heading: Shopping Discounts
subSections.content: Find discounted prices instantly while shopping.

subSections.heading: Data & Reports
subSections.content: Compare values using percent increase or decrease.

subSections.heading: Personal Budgeting
subSections.content: Track spending or savings as a percentage of income.

subSections.heading: Example 3 – Percent Increase
subSections.content: Old Value = 500, New Value = 650 → (650 − 500) ÷ 500 × 100 = 30% increase

subSections.heading: Example 4 – Percent Decrease
subSections.content: Old Value = 800, New Value = 600 → (800 − 600) ÷ 800 × 100 = 25% decrease

faq.a: It is an online tool that helps you perform all types of percentage calculations instantly and accurately.

faq.q: Can I calculate percent increase with this tool?
faq.a: Yes, the calculator supports percentage increase mode for quick results.
Yes, you can calculate decrease percentages easily.

faq.q: How do I calculate a percentage manually?
Can I convert percentages to numbers or numbers to percentages?
faq.a: Yes, the tool supports percentage conversion both ways.
Yes, the percentage calculator is 100% free and works on all devices.
